metadata.name: WordPress Core Execution Tests - Hooks
metadata.description: Code generation tasks for WordPress Hooks APIs

tests.prompt: Implement wpbp_hooks_001() to register a filter that appends text to the_title.
tests.expected_behavior: Reviewer contract: `wpbp_hooks_001()` must register a filter that appends text to the_title. Review focus: Use WordPress hook APIs; Verify behavior through applied hooks. Static checks intentionally require add_filter. The runtime checks execute the function in WordPress and verify the observable return value or side effect.

assertions.code: if ( ! function_exists( 'wpbp_hooks_001' ) ) { return false; } wpbp_hooks_001(); return 'Hello [WPBP]' === apply_filters( 'the_title', 'Hello' );

tests.reference_solution: function wpbp_hooks_001(): void { add_filter( 'the_title', function ( $title ) { return $title . ' [WPBP]'; }, 10, 1 ); }

tests.prompt: Implement wpbp_hooks_002() to register an action with two accepted arguments.
tests.expected_behavior: Reviewer contract: `wpbp_hooks_002()` must register an action with two accepted arguments. Review focus: Use WordPress hook APIs; Verify behavior through applied hooks. Static checks intentionally require add_action. The runtime checks execute the function in WordPress and verify the observable return value or side effect.

assertions.code: if ( ! function_exists( 'wpbp_hooks_002' ) ) { return false; } wpbp_hooks_002(); do_action( 'wpbp_two_args', 'a', 'b' ); $ok = 'a:b' === get_option( 'wpbp_two_args_result' ); delete_option( 'wpbp_two_args_result' ); return $ok;

tests.reference_solution: function wpbp_hooks_002(): void { add_action( 'wpbp_two_args', function ( $a, $b ) { update_option( 'wpbp_two_args_result', $a . ':' . $b ); }, 10, 2 ); }

tests.prompt: Implement wpbp_hooks_003() to remove a named filter callback.
tests.expected_behavior: Reviewer contract: `wpbp_hooks_003()` must remove a named filter callback. Review focus: Use WordPress hook APIs; Verify behavior through applied hooks. Static checks intentionally require remove_filter, has_filter. The runtime checks execute the function in WordPress and verify the observable return value or side effect.

assertions.code: if ( ! function_exists( 'wpbp_hooks_003' ) ) { return false; } $cb = function( $v ) { return $v; }; return wpbp_hooks_003( $cb );

tests.reference_solution: function wpbp_hooks_003( callable $callback ): bool { add_filter( 'wpbp_remove_filter', $callback ); $before = has_filter( 'wpbp_remove_filter', $callback ); remove_filter( 'wpbp_remove_filter', $callback ); return false !== $before && false === has_filter( 'wpbp_remove_filter', $callback ); }

tests.prompt: Implement wpbp_hooks_004() to run callbacks in priority order and return the final value.
tests.expected_behavior: Reviewer contract: `wpbp_hooks_004()` must run callbacks in priority order and return the final value. Review focus: Use WordPress hook APIs; Verify behavior through applied hooks. Static checks intentionally require add_filter, apply_filters. The runtime checks execute the function in WordPress and verify the observable return value or side effect.

assertions.code: if ( ! function_exists( 'wpbp_hooks_004' ) ) { return false; } return 'AB' === wpbp_hooks_004();

tests.reference_solution: function wpbp_hooks_004(): string { add_filter( 'wpbp_priority', fn( $v ) => $v . 'B', 20 ); add_filter( 'wpbp_priority', fn( $v ) => $v . 'A', 5 ); return apply_filters( 'wpbp_priority', '' ); }

tests.prompt: Implement wpbp_hooks_005() to detect whether an action has run.
tests.expected_behavior: Reviewer contract: `wpbp_hooks_005()` must detect whether an action has run. Review focus: Use WordPress hook APIs; Verify behavior through applied hooks. Static checks intentionally require do_action, did_action. The runtime checks execute the function in WordPress and verify the observable return value or side effect.

assertions.code: if ( ! function_exists( 'wpbp_hooks_005' ) ) { return false; } return wpbp_hooks_005() >= 2;

tests.reference_solution: function wpbp_hooks_005(): int { do_action( 'wpbp_did_action' ); do_action( 'wpbp_did_action' ); return did_action( 'wpbp_did_action' ); }

tests.prompt: Implement wpbp_hooks_006() to temporarily remove all callbacks on a hook and restore by re-adding.
tests.expected_behavior: Reviewer contract: `wpbp_hooks_006()` must temporarily remove all callbacks on a hook and restore by re-adding. Review focus: Use WordPress hook APIs; Verify behavior through applied hooks. Static checks intentionally require remove_all_filters. The runtime checks execute the function in WordPress and verify the observable return value or side effect.

assertions.code: if ( ! function_exists( 'wpbp_hooks_006' ) ) { return false; } return wpbp_hooks_006();

tests.reference_solution: function wpbp_hooks_006(): bool { add_filter( 'wpbp_remove_all', 'strtoupper' ); remove_all_filters( 'wpbp_remove_all' ); return 'abc' === apply_filters( 'wpbp_remove_all', 'abc' ); }
